channel.title: Payment Systems on bizOpsPlaybook — Practical Business Plans for Solo Entrepreneurs
channel.description: Recent content in Payment Systems on bizOpsPlaybook — Practical Business Plans for Solo Entrepreneurs

item.title: Laundromat Card Conversion 2026: Coin to Card Real ROI Math
item.description: Every laundromat owner considers card conversion at some point. Coin-operated equipment is reliable and simple, but coins are cash that has to be counted, transported, deposited, and reconciled — every week, forever. Card systems eliminate the cash-handling burden, add customer convenience, and enable loyalty programs. But conversion costs $8K–$15K per store, plus ongoing card processing fees. The economic question is straightforward: does the revenue lift + operational savings pay back the conversion cost inside a reasonable window?
